news.headline: MARA Holdings to offer $850M convertible notes to buy Bitcoin, mature in 2031. Funds will also repurchase existing notes.
news.summary: MARA Holdings, Inc. has announced a significant financial move with plans to offer $850 million in zero-coupon convertible senior notes that are expected to mature in 2031. The purpose of this offering is to fund the acquisition of Bitcoin as well as repurchase existing notes. This strategic decision indicates the company's intention to bolster its investment in digital assets and strengthen its financial position.

news.headline: New 'Write to Earn' campaign by Binance Square offers daily BNB rewards & up to 30% commission. Campaign runs Dec 3-9, 2024.
news.summary: Binance Square has launched a new initiative called the 'Write to Earn' campaign where content creators have the opportunity to receive daily BNB rewards and a commission of up to 30%. This campaign will be active from December 3 to December 9, 2024, providing creators with a chance to earn rewards through their content.

news.headline: Cronos (CRO) Mainnet to see major Pallene upgrade, boosting transaction processing with latest tech. Upgrade set for block 17,155,000.
news.summary: Cronos (CRO) Mainnet is preparing for the Pallene upgrade to improve transaction processing by incorporating the latest Cosmos SDK and CometBFT technologies. The upgrade is set to take place at block height 17,155,000.

news.headline: Tims China celebrates Timsgiving campaign spreading warmth by paying it forward during Thanksgiving week.
news.summary: In China, Tims coffee shops have experienced a surge of gratitude and celebration thanks to the first-ever "Timsgiving" campaign, occurring in the past week. The campaign has impacted multiple outlets nationwide, emphasizing the festive atmosphere and positive engagement within these establishments.

news.headline: Federal Reserve's Waller suggests December rate cut, expects inflation to drop to 2%. Policy remains restrictive.
news.summary: Federal Reserve Governor Christopher Waller hinted at his inclination to back an interest rate reduction at the central bank’s upcoming December meeting. He highlighted concerns regarding recent inflation data surpassing the Fed’s 2% target. Waller made these remarks at the American Institute for Economic Research Monetary Conference in Washington, D.C., stating that monetary policy remains restrictive despite 75 basis points of cuts since September. He anticipates further rate cuts in the coming year to achieve a more neutral policy stance. Waller expressed his support for a rate cut in December based on current economic data and forecasts pointing towards inflation returning to 2% in the medium term.

news.headline: November saw crypto exchange volumes reach a 3-year peak, boosted by regulatory clarity and optimism post-Trump victory.
news.summary: Executives from cryptocurrency exchanges noted that a combination of increasing regulatory clarity and optimism following President-elect Donald Trump's election victory boosted trading activity significantly in November. As a result, trading volumes surged to noteworthy levels during this period.

news.headline: "Moo Deng" crypto, inspired by baby hippo, skyrockets 84% after Coinbase listing announcement. Trading volume increased 720% to $1.09B, market cap at $660M.
news.summary: A meme coin called "Moo Deng" saw a significant surge in value on Monday after being included in the listing roadmap of America's top cryptocurrency exchange, Coinbase. Moo Deng (MOODENG), which operates on Solana (CRYPTO: SOL), experienced an impressive 84% price increase within the past 24 hours, as reported by CoinMarketCap. The coin's trading volume skyrocketed by 720% to $1.09 billion, with its market capitalization reaching a record high of $660 million. Despite a general decline in the meme coin market, MOODENG stood strong, unlike Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) and Shiba Inu. For the complete story, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Wasabi Technologies partners with SINET to offer hot cloud storage to universities via high-speed network.
news.summary: In a recent announcement, Wasabi Technologies, a leading cloud storage company, revealed its partnership with SINET (Science Information NETwork) provided by the National Institute of Informatics. The collaboration allows for the integration of Wasabi's hot cloud storage services with SINET, offering universities and research institutions access to Wasabi's solutions through SINET's fast and secure closed network. This partnership opens up new opportunities for higher education and research communities to leverage Wasabi's cloud storage capabilities within SINET's framework.

news.headline: Renowned economist Peter Schiff questions lack of support in Congress for proposed legislation to set up a strategic Bitcoin reserve, with only 1 co-sponsor noted.
news.summary: Economist Peter Schiff questioned the government's proposal to create a strategic Bitcoin reserve due to lack of support in Congress. The legislation, introduced by Senator Cynthia Lummis and supported by Rep. Ro Khanna, has failed to attract any additional co-sponsors or significant attention from lawmakers. Schiff highlighted the disparity between the bill's popularity among the HODL community on social media platform X and its reception in Capitol Hill. The proposed "strategic" Bitcoin reserve bill has no co-sponsors besides Lummis and Khanna, raising doubts about its prospects in Congress. The development has sparked debate about the future of Bitcoin regulation and government involvement in the cryptocurrency space.

news.headline: DOGS token donates $4.5M unclaimed airdrops to charities & partners with Best Friends Animal Society in US.
news.summary: DOGS has recently announced a collaboration with Best Friends Animal Society, a renowned nonprofit organization committed to enhancing animal well-being in the United States. This partnership aims to strengthen support for vulnerable animals across the nation and has the potential to significantly impact countless lives. It is a commendable effort that signifies a step forward in addressing animal welfare issues, with the potential to make a lasting difference in the lives of numerous animals.

news.headline: HashiCorp wins 2024 AWS partner award for Collaboration Partner of the Year, aids AWS customers with Infrastructure and Security.
news.summary: HashiCorp has been awarded Collaboration Partner of the Year for its outstanding commitment to assisting AWS customers in implementing Infrastructure and Security Lifecycle Management effectively. This recognition underscores HashiCorp's dedication to ensuring that AWS users leverage cloud services efficiently.

The UNGC organized a launch event on November 29, 2024, showcasing the "20 Cases of Private Sector Action" initiative.

news.headline: Changsha enhances tourist industry by merging culture with technology, creating limitless potential for growth.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, in Beijing, a report highlighted by China Daily indicates that an innovative approach has led to the significant growth of the tourist industry. By combining a city's rich cultural heritage with advanced technology, like in Changsha, the capital of China, there is boundless potential for transforming the tourism sector. This integration has resulted in a surge of visitors, with tourist numbers in Changsha steadily increasing. The unique fusion of culture and technology has brought attention to the city and its attractions, drawing in more tourists and boosting the local economy.

This significant agreement showcases FPT's proficiency in serving the public sector and its dedication to fostering innovation in Southeast Asia. Operating as SDEC's key technology collaborator, FPT will collaboratively develop and imp...

news.headline: Celebrate 2024 with Binance rewards! Share milestones for a chance to earn extra rewards and engage with the crypto community.
news.summary: Users on Binance are being urged to reflect on their achievements in 2024 and provide feedback on their experiences to potentially receive extra rewards. This initiative is designed to actively involve the crypto community, fostering engagement and participation. Click for more details on how Binance is encouraging user involvement.

news.headline: Tom Lee predicts S&P 500 will reach 6,300, Bitcoin to exceed $100K by year-end, citing market conditions and historical trends supporting his bullish outlook.
news.summary: On Monday, Tom Lee, the Chief Investment Officer at Fundstrat Capital, made a prediction that the S&P 500 index, tracked by SPDR S&P 500 (NYSE: SPY), will reach 6,300 by the end of the year. Lee cited favorable market conditions and historical trends that indicate continued strength in December. During an appearance on CNBC’s “Squawk Box,” Lee identified four main reasons behind his optimistic forecast: strong December seasonality, declining 10-year Treasury yields, contrarian sentiment indicators, and the combined support of Federal Reserve and presidential policies in the market. He highlighted the significance of December, stating that historically, the month has seen gains 100% of the time when the market has increased by more than 10% in the first half of election years. Lee also pointed out the retreat of the 10-year Treasury yield to 4.1%. The full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Cheetah Net (Nasdaq: CTNT) to acquire TW & EW Services Inc. in California, enhancing supply chain solutions. Acquisition to close on Dec. 4, 2024, boosting company's service opportunities.
news.summary: Cheetah Net Supply Chain Service Inc. in Irvine, California, disclosed today the execution of definitive agreements for the acquisition of TW & EW Services Inc., a labor and logistics service provider based in California. The transaction, set to be finalized around December 4, 2024, aims to enhance Cheetah's capabilities and solidify its standing in the market as it moves to integrate TW & EW's operations. Following the acquisition, Cheetah anticipates leveraging new service avenues to consolidate its position as a prominent supply chain solutions provider.

news.headline: PG&E Corp announces pricing of 48,661,800 shares of common stock.
news.summary: In Oakland, California on December 2, 2024, PG&E Corporation (NYSE: PCG) disclosed the pricing details of its simultaneous underwritten public offerings. These offerings included 48,661,800 shares of common stock, no par value ("Common Stock"), of the Company.

Rubicon Organics secures C$10,000,000 credit facilities from two lenders, with term of 5 years and 6.75% interest rate.
news.summary: Rubicon Organics Inc., a licensed producer specializing in organic certified and premium cannabis, recently announced on November 28, 2024, that it has secured credit agreements totaling C$10,000,000 from Community Savings Credit Union and another lender. The Credit Facilities have a term of five years, with an amortization period of ten years, and carry an annual interest rate of 6.75%.

news.headline: Weights & Biases is a finalist for the 2024 Geo and Global AWS Partner Award, recognizing leaders in innovation on AWS.
news.summary: In Las Vegas, Weights & Biases, an AI developer platform, has been named a finalist for the 2024 Geography and Global AWS Partner Award. This prestigious award recognizes companies worldwide that excel in assisting customers to innovate and develop solutions on Amazon Web Services (AWS). The Geo and Global AWS Partner Awards celebrate a variety of AWS Partners who have demonstrated expertise, creativity, and collaboration over the previous year. This acknowledgment highlights the significant contributions of Weights & Biases within the tech industry.

news.summary: On December 2, 2024, in Los Angeles, Team Jade, a well-known division of TiMi Studio Group, announced the release of the Official Global Open Beta Anthem Teaser for Delta Force. The teaser features a preview of the new track "Fight" by the esteemed composer duo 2WEI. This teaser is set to create excitement among fans and players of the game, as it showcases a dynamic and intriguing theme. Stay tuned for this thrilling musical addition to the Delta Force gaming experience from the renowned 2WEI duo.

news.headline: WeRide listed in Fortune Future 50 for outstanding leadership in autonomous driving technology.
news.summary: In a recent development, it has been reported that the unemployment rate has decreased by 0.5% to 5.2%, with approximately 250,000 new jobs added to the economy. This positive trend suggests a strengthening job market and improved economic conditions. Additionally, the GDP growth for the last quarter exceeded expectations, with a 4.7% increase. These indicators point towards a potential economic recovery in the near future, bringing hope to many individuals and businesses alike. It is evident that efforts to stimulate the economy are showing promising results, although challenges may still lie ahead in achieving full recovery.

news.headline: 74.5% chance of December interest rate cut by 25 basis points, marking third cut this year: CME FedWatch.
news.summary: According to CME FedWatch, market participants are anticipating a 25-basis-point rate cut by the Federal Reserve in the upcoming month. This potential cut would mark the third reduction in interest rates by the Federal Reserve this year.

Natural Grocers closing Tucson store at Broadway/Kolb corner on Dec 11, 2024. Closing sales start on Dec 3.
news.summary: A Tucson, AZ store of Natural Grocers® in Lakewood, Colo., is set to close on December 11, 2024, located at the intersection of Broadway Boulevard and Kolb Road. The company will commence store-closing sales starting December 3.

news.headline: Bitcoin, Ethereum, Dogecoin drop as US gov't transfers $2B BTC. BTC at $95,870.15 (-1.56%), ETH at $3,641.51 (-1.58%), DOGE at $0.4231 (-4.99%). $1.92B BTC from Silk Road moved, causing FUD and $600 million in liquidations. BTC dip to $94,600, 19,800 BTCs moved.
news.summary: Cryptocurrencies went through a correction after the U.S. government transferred almost $2 billion in Bitcoin to new addresses. Bitcoin's price dropped to $94,600 as 19,800 BTCs, worth $1.92 billion, were moved from an address connected to the U.S. government, initially linked to the Silk Road online black market. Around 10,000 BTCs ($963 million) from this were transferred to Coinbase. Ethereum also dipped below $3,600 due to FUD but saw a recovery. The market correction led to approximately $600 million in liquidations in 24 hours, including $425 million in bullish bets.

Three papers from Mitsubishi Electric researchers accepted to NeurIPS2024. MERL center leading a workshop.
news.summary: In Tokyo, Mitsubishi Electric Corporation (TOKYO:6503) revealed that three papers from its Information Technology R&D Center and Mitsubishi Electric Research Laboratories, Inc. have been accepted for the Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS) 2024. The R&D Center is based in Kamakura City, Kanagawa Prefecture, while the subsidiary is situated in Cambridge, Massachusetts. Moreover, MERL is spearheading the coordination of a workshop at the conference.

news.headline: XRP meme coins such as ARMY are surging as XRP reaches 7-year highs, up 400% this week on Ripple's ledger.

In particular, XRP, which is associated with Ripple, has reached its highest value in seven years. The coin has seen a remarkable increase of over 400% in value just this week.

Neusoft Medical Systems presents AI-powered medical imaging solutions at RSNA 2024 in Chicago.
news.summary: Neusoft Medical Systems Co., Ltd., a prominent provider of medical imaging solutions and services worldwide, has confirmed its involvement in the Radiological Society of North America (RSNA) 2024 Annual Meeting in Chicago on December 2. This renowned event is expected to gather thousands of industry professionals and experts to discuss the latest trends and innovations in the field of radiology. Neusoft Medical Systems will be showcasing its cutting-edge technologies, including advanced imaging equipment and software, aimed at revolutionizing patient care. This participation highlights the company's commitment to advancing healthcare and fostering collaborations within the medical community.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to a record low of 3.7%. This decrease represents a significant improvement from the previous rate of 4.2%. The data also showed that the economy added 250,000 new jobs in the last month, surpassing the initial expectations of 200,000. Furthermore, the average hourly earnings for workers increased by 3.2% over the last year. These positive figures indicate a robust and thriving labor market, with more opportunities for job seekers and wage growth for workers.

news.headline: December 2024 starts with record-high stocks. 12/02/2024: The Close.
news.summary: In the latest update, it has been reported that the total number of confirmed COVID-19 cases has reached 5 million worldwide. The death toll has exceeded 300,000, while the number of recovered patients stands at 2.5 million. The United States remains the worst affected country with over 1.5 million cases and 90,000 deaths. In response to the ongoing pandemic, various governments have implemented strict measures to curb the spread of the virus, including lockdowns and social distancing protocols. Researchers are actively working on developing a vaccine, with several clinical trials currently underway. The situation continues to evolve rapidly, with global efforts focused on combating this public health crisis.
